description_long: This is a medium-sized, soft-sided handbag with a predominantly blue exterior accented by white and red panels. The bag features two thick, white rope-style handles that loop through metal-reinforced eyelets at the top, giving it a nautical-inspired look. The base and lower edges are white, with some visible texturing and wear, while the side panels incorporate a red triangular section for added visual interest. The interior appears to be lined with a light-colored, possibly fabric material, and the bag has a slightly slouched, flexible structure. There are no visible logos, decorative hardware, or external pockets. The closure mechanism is not clearly visible but may be a simple open-top or drawstring style, as suggested by the handle configuration.
description: A blue, white, and red soft handbag with thick rope handles and a nautical-inspired design. The bag has a flexible structure and no visible logos or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue main body, white base, and two thick white rope handles prominently draped over the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red triangular panel, the white base, and the thickness of the rope handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly blue surface with a red accent on the left and a simple, unadorned back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue panel, white base, and the rope handles from a different angle.
attribute_strap_type: Two thick, short rope handles; non-adjustable; attached through metal-reinforced eyelets at the top.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Likely open-top or drawstring closure, suggested by the rope handle configuration; no visible zipper or snap.
